title: tagetes dianthifolia
intro: Tagetes dianthifolia, also known as African marigold or brown marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tagetes dianthifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used as a natural dye due to its vibrant orange and yellow colors.
